use_cases: Display a loading state while fetching data from an API
Show processing feedback during form submissions
Indicate page transitions or route changes
Provide visual feedback during async operations
Placeholder during image or media loading
ai_summary: A minimalist grid-based loading indicator component featuring a 3x3 layout of pulsing squares with staggered animation delays. Built with Tailwind CSS animation utilities, it supports three size variants (sm, md, lg) and automatically adjusts to dark/light modes. This atomic component serves as a lightweight alternative to traditional spinners, ideal for modern SaaS applications, dashboards, and e-commerce platforms requiring clean loading states.
